login.title: Sign In
login.selectProvider: Sign in with your identity provider
login.noProviders: No identity providers configured. Please contact your administrator.
login.footer: Secure authentication powered by OpenID Connect

unauthorized.title: Access Denied
unauthorized.message: You don't have permission to access this page.
unauthorized.logout: Sign out and try a different account

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.message: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

auth.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
auth.unauthorized: You are not authorized to access this resource.

collections.title: Collections
collections.versionHistoryDescription: Point-in-time snapshots of this collection's schema.
collections.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this collection?

validationRules.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this validation rule? This action cannot be undone.

recordTypes.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this record type? This action cannot be undone.
recordTypes.isDefaultHint: New records will use this record type by default.
recordTypes.noPicklistFields: This collection has no picklist fields to configure.

fieldHistory.description: Field history tracks changes to individual field values when records are updated.
fieldHistory.trackedFieldsNote: Only fields with 'Track History' enabled will have their changes recorded.
fieldHistory.noTrackedFields: No fields have history tracking enabled yet.

setupAudit.title: Schema Changes
setupAudit.description: Administrative changes to this collection's structure — fields, validation rules, record types.

roles.descriptionPlaceholder: Enter a description for this role...
roles.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this role? This action cannot be undone.

validation.nameTooLong: Role name must be 50 characters or less
validation.nameFormat: Name must be lowercase, start with a letter, and contain only letters, numbers, and underscores
validation.descriptionTooLong: Description must be 500 characters or less

policies.descriptionPlaceholder: Enter a description for this policy...
policies.expressionHint: Enter a policy expression using the supported syntax. Example: user.role == "admin" or resource.owner_id == user.id
policies.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this policy? This action cannot be undone.

validation.nameTooLong: Policy name must be 50 characters or less
validation.nameFormat: Name must be lowercase, start with a letter, and contain only letters, numbers, and underscores
validation.descriptionTooLong: Description must be 500 characters or less
validation.expressionTooLong: Expression must be 2000 characters or less

oidc.title: OIDC Providers
oidc.issuerHint: The OIDC issuer URL. This is typically the base URL of your identity provider.
oidc.clientSecretPlaceholderEdit: Leave empty to keep existing secret
oidc.clientSecretHint: The client secret from your identity provider. This will be stored securely.
oidc.clientSecretHintEdit: Leave empty to keep the existing client secret.
oidc.scopesHint: Comma-separated list of OAuth scopes to request. 'openid' is required.
oidc.rolesClaimHint: Path to the roles claim in JWT tokens (e.g., 'roles', 'realm_access.roles', 'groups'). Leave empty if not using role-based authorization.
oidc.rolesMappingHint: JSON object mapping external role names to internal Kelta roles. Example: {"keycloak-admin": "ADMIN", "keycloak-user": "USER"}
oidc.emailClaimHint: Path to the email claim in JWT tokens. Defaults to 'email' if not specified.
oidc.usernameClaimHint: Path to the username claim in JWT tokens. Defaults to 'preferred_username' if not specified.
oidc.nameClaimHint: Path to the display name claim in JWT tokens. Defaults to 'name' if not specified.
oidc.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this provider? Users will no longer be able to authenticate using this provider.

validation.nameTooLong: Provider name must be 100 characters or less
validation.issuerInvalid: Issuer must be a valid URL
validation.clientIdTooLong: Client ID must be 255 characters or less
validation.clientSecretRequired: Client secret is required for new providers
validation.scopesRequired: At least one scope is required
validation.rolesMappingInvalidJson: Roles mapping must be valid JSON
validation.claimPathTooLong: Claim path must not exceed 200 characters

picklists.title: Picklists
picklists.descriptionPlaceholder: Enter a description for this picklist...
picklists.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this picklist? This action cannot be undone.
picklists.noValues: No values defined yet. Click "Add Value" to get started.

validation.nameTooLong: Name must be 100 characters or less
validation.descriptionTooLong: Description must be 500 characters or less

picklistDependencies.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this dependency? This action cannot be undone.
picklistDependencies.noPicklistFields: This collection has no picklist fields.
picklistDependencies.needTwoPicklistFields: Picklist dependencies require at least two picklist fields. This collection has only one picklist field.
picklistDependencies.mappingHint: Check which dependent values should be available when each controlling value is selected.
picklistDependencies.noValuesForField: No values found for this field.

pages.title: Page Builder
pages.selectComponent: Select a component to edit its properties
pages.canvasHint: Drag components from the palette or click to add them
pages.unsavedConfirm: You have unsaved changes. Discard them?

dnd.instructions: To pick up a widget, press space or enter. Use the arrow keys to move it. Press space or enter again to drop, or escape to cancel.

pages.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this page? This action cannot be undone.
pages.nameHint: Lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores only. Must start with a letter.
pages.pathHint: The URL path for this page. Must start with /

validation.nameTooLong: Page name must be 50 characters or less
validation.nameFormat: Name must be lowercase, start with a letter, and contain only letters, numbers, and underscores

menus.title: Menu Builder
menus.addItemHint: Click "Add Item" to create your first menu item.
menus.nameHint: Lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores only. Must start with a letter.
menus.pathHint: The URL path for this menu item. Must start with / if provided.
menus.accessPoliciesHint: Select policies that control who can see this menu item. Leave empty to allow all users.
menus.confirmDeleteMenu: Are you sure you want to delete this menu? This action cannot be undone.
menus.confirmDeleteItem: Are you sure you want to delete this menu item? This will also delete any child items.

validation.nameTooLong: Menu name must be 50 characters or less
validation.nameFormat: Name must be lowercase, start with a letter, and contain only letters, numbers, and underscores
validation.labelTooLong: Label must be 100 characters or less

menus.iconHint: Lucide icon name shown in the app switcher
menus.isDefault: Default app (selected when a user has no preference)

access.hint: Users without this permission get a 404 — the page is hidden, not shown as forbidden.

environments.title: Environments
environments.noEnvironmentsHint: Create a sandbox to safely test configuration changes
environments.name: Name
environments.refreshMessage: Refresh "{{name}}" from its source environment? The sandbox configuration will be overwritten and any unpromoted changes will be lost. This cannot be undone.
environments.deleteMessage: Archive "{{name}}"? For local sandboxes this decommissions the backing sandbox tenant and its data. This cannot be undone.
environments.variantLocalHint: Creates an isolated sandbox tenant copied from this environment's configuration
environments.variantRemoteHint: Registers a remote Kelta environment as a promotion target
environments.credentialRefPlaceholder: Credential holding a personal access token for the remote environment
environments.credentialsWarning: Save these credentials now — the initial password is shown only once and cannot be retrieved again.
environments.noPromotionsHint: Start a promotion to move sandbox changes to another environment
environments.noSandboxes: No active sandboxes available to promote from
environments.noChanges: No changes detected — the sandbox matches its target
environments.creatorCannotApprove: The creator of a promotion cannot approve it — ask another administrator to approve.
environments.executeOverwriteMessage: Execute this promotion with conflict mode OVERWRITE? Conflicting items in the target environment will be overwritten. This cannot be undone.
environments.rollbackMessage: Roll back this promotion? The target environment will be restored to its pre-promotion snapshot.

collectionForm.descriptionPlaceholder: Enter a description for this collection...

collectionForm.displayFieldHint: The field shown when records appear in lookup dropdowns. If not set, defaults to a field named "name" or the first text field.

validation.nameTooLong: Collection name must be 50 characters or less

authorizationPanel.title: Authorization
authorizationPanel.hint: Configure which policies control access to this collection's routes and fields. Policies define who can perform specific operations.
authorizationPanel.routeDescription: Select a policy for each route operation. Users must satisfy the policy to perform the operation.
authorizationPanel.fieldDescription: Configure field-level access control. Expand a field to set read and write policies.
authorizationPanel.selectPolicyHint: Select a policy to control {{operation}} access
authorizationPanel.noFields: No fields defined in this collection. Add fields to configure field-level authorization.
authorizationPanel.noPoliciesWarning: No policies are defined. Create policies in the Policies page to configure authorization.

resourceForm.noFields: No fields defined in this collection.

validation.pattern: Value does not match the required pattern
validation.email: Please enter a valid email address

fieldEditor.nameHint: Lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores only. Must start with a letter.
fieldEditor.referenceTargetHint: Select the collection this field will reference.
fieldEditor.defaultValueHint: Value to use when no value is provided. For JSON fields, enter valid JSON.
fieldEditor.noValidationRules: No validation rules configured. Click "Add Rule" to add one.
fieldEditor.globalPicklistHint: Select the global picklist that provides values for this field.
fieldEditor.descriptionPlaceholder: Enter a description for this field...

masking.title: Data Masking
masking.help: Users whose profile lacks unmask rights see this field redacted (e.g. ***-**-6789). Note: analytics dashboards are not masked in this release.
masking.patternHelp: # reveals a character; any other character is shown literally, right-aligned.

rollup.title: Rollup Summary Configuration
rollup.childCollectionHint: Collection containing the records to aggregate.
rollup.foreignKeyHint: Master-detail field on the child collection that points back to this collection.

fn.sum: SUM — total of a numeric field
fn.avg: AVG — average of a numeric field

rollup.fieldHint: Field on the child collection to aggregate. Numeric for SUM/AVG; numeric or date for MIN/MAX.

formula.title: Formula Configuration
formula.returnTypeHint: Return type is immutable after the field is created.
formula.expressionHint: Reference fields by name (e.g. amount) and use functions like IF, CONCAT, ROUND.

validation.nameTooLong: Field name must be 50 characters or less
validation.nameFormat: Name must be lowercase, start with a letter, and contain only letters, numbers, and underscores
validation.fieldNameFormat: Name must start with a letter and contain only letters, numbers, and underscores
validation.displayNameTooLong: Display name must be 100 characters or less
validation.referenceTargetRequired: Target collection is required for reference fields
validation.picklistRequired: A global picklist is required for picklist fields
validation.rollupChildCollectionRequired: Child collection is required for rollup fields
validation.rollupForeignKeyRequired: Foreign key field is required for rollup fields
validation.rollupFunctionRequired: Aggregate function is required for rollup fields
validation.rollupFieldRequired: Aggregate field is required for SUM, AVG, MIN, and MAX
validation.formulaExpressionRequired: Expression is required for formula fields
validation.formulaReturnTypeRequired: Return type is required for formula fields
validation.descriptionTooLong: Description must be 500 characters or less

translations.title: Translations
translations.hint: Overrides replace the built-in text for this tenant. Keys are dotted paths (e.g. listPower.groupBy); use the same placeholders as the original string.
